headline: Analysts See 65% Upside for Intuit (INTU) Despite 40% One-Year Share Price Decline
summary: Intuit Inc. (NASDAQ:INTU) features in our list of the best low-risk high-reward stocks. As of April 7, 2026, 85% of covering analysts remain positive on Intuit Inc. (NASDAQ:INTU), and the $580.00 consensus price target implies a 65% upside. That sentiment remains even as share momentum stays weak. The stock has declined roughly 40% in the […]

headline: Morgan Stanley Calls These 2 Stocks ‘Top Picks’ for 2026 – Here’s Why
summary: Stocks have been acting like the war barely happened. Despite a six-week conflict with Iran, a surge in oil prices, and nonstop geopolitical noise, the S&P 500 has clawed its way back toward record levels. What looked like the start of a deeper slide is now being treated as a correction that may already be close to running its course. That shift is exactly what Morgan Stanley’s chief equity strategist, Michael Wilson, has been pointing to. In his latest note, he argues the market actually entere

headline: 8x8, Intuit, Okta, and Box Stocks Trade Up, What You Need To Know
summary: A number of stocks jumped in the afternoon session after markets benefited from a "risk-on" sentiment fueled by potential peace negotiations between the U.S. and Iran.
